meaning: n.露宿者,局外人,[地质]外露层
examples: "This one flawed study from McKinsey is truly an outlier, " wrote Nancy-Ann DeParle.
Britain, as ever, is an outlier.
As huge and oddly specific as that number may be, it is not an outlier.
We cannot get a groundswell for reform if we are distracted by titillating outlier stories.
